questions.content: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.
Mary has been called in for a meeting because
options: A she has been working too hard
B she has offered to lead an activity
C she is going on a training programme

questions.content: The most important part of planning a field trip is:
options: A to organize activities for everyone
B to know about the official rules for field trips
C to think about and plan for problems

questions.content:
(24) Mary’s plan must consider {{BLANK}} such as local rain or wind, the land and the party members.
(25) Mary’s plan does not need to consider things such as tropical storms or serious illnesses, which are known as {{BLANK}}

Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
Field trip plan
Weather:

Activities:
• Hiking – first aid kit, map and a {{BLANK}}
• Avoid routes where an avalanche, mudslide or {{BLANK}} is possible
Group members

sections.instruction: Follow the instructions for each question set.

questions.content:
Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
Cochlear implants – Advantages, disadvantages and factors
Hearing aids {{BLANK}} normal sounds, so they are good for mild hearing loss but not for severe loss. Cochlear implants help some people a lot, but do not work so well for everyone. The brain gets different {{BLANK}} from an implant, so users must relearn how to hear. Cochlear implants are not a cure. Users need ongoing training in {{BLANK}}, lip-reading and sign language. The surgery can damage nerves. It may also destroy any {{BLANK}}; in such cases, those users cannot go back to using a hearing aid. The most important factor for selecting users is the {{BLANK}} of their deafness and also age and previous speaking ability. Finally, the condition of the nerve cells in the cochlea is a factor because {{BLANK}} can damage these cells.
